properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT signing secret key (Base64-encoded, minimum 256 bits)

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds

properties.name: app.jwt-secret
properties.description: JWT signing secret used to sign and validate tokens (deprecated, use app.jwt.secret)

properties.name: app.jwt-expiration
properties.description: JWT expiration time in milliseconds (deprecated, use app.jwt.expiration-ms)

properties.name: gemini.api.key
properties.description: Google Gemini API key for AI chatbot functionality

properties.name: gemini.api.url
properties.description: Google Gemini API endpoint URL

properties.name: gemini.service.account.path
properties.description: Filesystem path to Google service account JSON key for Gemini

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-methods
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed HTTP methods for CORS

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-headers
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed headers for CORS

properties.name: app.cors.allow-credentials
properties.description: Whether to allow credentials in CORS requests

properties.name: app.cors.max-age
properties.description: CORS preflight cache duration in seconds

properties.name: app.rate-limit.enabled
properties.description: Enable/disable rate limiting

properties.name: app.rate-limit.requests-per-minute
properties.description: Maximum requests per minute per IP

properties.name: app.async.core-pool-size
properties.description: Core thread pool size for async operations

properties.name: app.async.max-pool-size
properties.description: Maximum thread pool size for async operations

properties.name: app.async.queue-capacity
properties.description: Queue capacity for async task executor

properties.name: app.cache.default-ttl
properties.description: Default cache TTL in minutes

properties.name: app.cache.book-details-ttl
properties.description: Book details cache TTL in minutes

properties.name: app.cache.featured-books-ttl
properties.description: Featured books cache TTL in minutes

properties.name: app.cache.suggestions-ttl
properties.description: Suggestions cache TTL in minutes

properties.name: app.cache.system-settings-ttl
properties.description: System settings cache TTL in minutes

properties.name: app.api.dev-url
properties.description: Development API base URL for Swagger/OpenAPI

properties.name: app.api.prod-url
properties.description: Production API base URL for Swagger/OpenAPI

properties.name: allowed.origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins (legacy property)
